landing.hero.subtitle: Urubuga rumwe rw'abakora ubuzima, ibigo n'inzego z'igihugu kugira ngo basuzume, batange no basubiza ibibazo bya malariya ako kanya.
landing.features.title: Gushyigikira abakora ubuzima
landing.features.subtitle: Sisitemu yacu huza abajyanama b'ubuzima, ibigo nderabuzima n'ibitaro binini mu buryo bumwe bwo gutanga raporo.
landing.feature1.title: Itangazo rihuta
landing.feature1.body: Tanga raporo y'ibibazo byemejwe ako kanya kugira ngo amatangazo yihutire mu muryango w'ubuzima, ntihabe gutinda mu kwita ku murwayi.
landing.feature2.title: Gukurikirana ahantu
landing.feature2.body: Reba aho indwara ihagaragara mu gihe cy'ukuri hamwe n'ikarita kugira ngo ubone aho uburyo bukenewe cyane.
landing.feature3.title: Amakuru yizewe
landing.feature3.body: Ubwigenge bw'umurwayi ni ingenzi. Uburyo bw'ibanga bukomeza bukora kugira ngo amakuru y'ubuvuzi abe mu buryo bwemewe n'amategeko y'igihugu.
landing.trust.title: Ibyemezo bishingiye ku makuru bizana ubuzima
landing.trust.subtitle: Injira mu bantu benshi bakora ubuzima bakoresha MalariaSync buri munsi kugira ngo bahuze ibisubizo, bagucunge ibisubizo by'abarwayi, bagafata ingamba zo gukumira indwara mu muryango.
landing.footer.copyright: Sisitemu yo Kumenyesha Malariya. Uburenganzira bwose buhagije.
